meta.titleTemplate: {{brand}} — Coconut Shisha Charcoal Factory in {{city}}, Indonesia
meta.descriptionTemplate: Wholesale coconut shell shisha charcoal briquettes from {{port}}, {{country}}. {{iso9001Short}} certified, IMDG {{unNumber}} compliant. MOQ {{moqLabel}}, lead time {{leadTimeLabel}}. Request free samples or message us on WhatsApp.

hero.eyebrow: Coconut shell charcoal briquette factory · {{city}}, {{country}} · since {{year}}
hero.h1: Natural coconut charcoal briquettes for shisha, by the container.
hero.sub: {{brand}} ships {{capacityMonth}}-tons-per-month from our {{city}} factory under {{iso9001Short}} and {{unNumber}} — MOQ {{moqTons}} tons / 20-ft container.
hero.imageAlt: Workers in branded uniforms loading a 20-ft container at the {{brand}} coconut charcoal factory in {{city}}, {{country}}, with the company sign visible on the factory exterior.

trust.un1361Tooltip: {{imdgLabel}} — international maritime dangerous-goods classification for self-heating substances; we file the declaration with every shipment.

hero.waPrefill: Hello Mulia Charcoal — please share your USD price list, MOQ details, and current lead time for coconut shisha charcoal briquettes.

trustStrip.aria: Proof signals from REACH compliance to shipping partners

reach.label: REACH compliant
reach.definition: What is REACH? — REACH is the EU's Registration, Evaluation, Authorisation and Restriction of Chemicals regulation; we declare REACH compliance for all coconut-shell binders and starches used in production.

audits.definition: Carsurin and Beckjorindo are independent Indonesian testing laboratories accredited under ISO/IEC 17025. They run our quarterly burn, ash, moisture and fixed-carbon tests and issue the COA we ship with every container.

shipping.definition: We are approved to book FCL containers directly with Maersk, MSC and CMA CGM out of {{port}}. Bookings file IMDG {{unNumber}} Class {{unClass}} declarations and ship with the Self-Heating Test report.

languages.definition: Our export desk handles wholesale inquiries in {{salesLanguages}}. Reply on WhatsApp in your preferred language; the team routes the conversation internally to a native speaker.

countries.definition: We have shipped 20-ft and 40-ft containers of coconut shisha charcoal to wholesale buyers across the EU, GCC, North America, the CIS region, and South-East Asia.

products.h2: Six coconut-shell shapes for shisha and hookah, custom-sized to your brand.
products.intro: Each shape is pressed from 100% coconut shell carbon and food-grade tapioca starch, then cured for 18–24 hours; we cut sizes to your specification and pack them in your branded box.
products.ctaSamplesSubtext: Tick the shapes you want and we will send a paid sample kit with batch COA. WhatsApp opens on click.

cube.name: Cube
cube.description: The reference shisha format. Five edge sizes from 22 to 28 mm; uniform edges and no first-light cracking.
cube.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal coconut shell cube briquettes (25×25 mm), photographed on a white seamless background with the Mulia Charcoal logo visible on the inner box.

stix.name: Stix / Finger
stix.description: Slim finger briquettes for kaloud and HMD-style heat-management devices. Long burn at low surface temperature.
stix.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal coconut shell stix / finger briquettes (20×50 mm), photographed on a white seamless background with the Mulia Charcoal logo visible on the inner box.

hexagonal.name: Hexagonal
hexagonal.description: Six-sided briquettes with a centre hole — preferred by retail tobacco brands for shelf appeal and even ignition.
hexagonal.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal coconut shell hexagonal briquettes (20×50 mm) with centre hole, photographed on a white seamless background with the Mulia Charcoal logo visible on the inner box.

dome.name: D-shape / Dome
dome.description: Hemisphere briquettes shaped to seat flush against ceramic and silicone shisha bowls.
dome.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal coconut shell dome / D-shape briquettes (25 mm), photographed on a white seamless background with the Mulia Charcoal logo visible on the inner box.

flat.name: Flat / Slab
flat.description: Flat slab cut for kaloud, foil and large-bowl applications. Maximum heat-management surface area.
flat.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal coconut shell flat slab briquettes (25×25×17 mm), photographed on a white seamless background with the Mulia Charcoal logo visible on the inner box.

lotus.name: Lotus / Cloud
lotus.description: Decorative profile briquettes for premium shisha lounges. Same coconut shell formulation, distinctive shape.
lotus.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal coconut shell lotus / cloud briquette (3-piece set), photographed on a white seamless background with the Mulia Charcoal logo visible on the inner box.

specs.h2: Three quality grades, batch-tested, ready for 18-ton FCL.
specs.intro: All three grades are 100% natural coconut shell charcoal — no chemicals, no fillers — produced under {{isoStandard}} and IMDG {{unNumber}} transport classification. Per-batch certificates of analysis are issued by {{auditors}} independent labs.
specs.caption: Factory targets per grade. Lab certificate of analysis (COA) issued per shipment.
specs.gradePickerLegend: Choose the grade you want a price for
specs.gradePickerHelp: Pick a grade — the CTA below pre-fills the WhatsApp message accordingly.
specs.ctaMessageTemplate: Hello Mulia Charcoal — please share your USD price list FOB {{port}} for {{grade}} grade coconut shisha charcoal, including MOQ and current lead time.

items.a: Ash content is the percentage of mineral residue left after combustion. Lower ash means a cleaner burn, less debris on the bowl and less odour; coconut shell briquettes typically run 1.6%-2.8% by mass. Detail at /quality/specifications-explained#ash.

Fixed carbon is the share of pure carbon left after volatile matter and moisture have burned off. Higher fixed carbon means a longer, hotter burn at lower ash. Our Platinum grade hits ≥ 82% fixed carbon.

items.q: How long does Platinum grade burn?
items.a: Platinum grade burns 2.5+ hours per cube on a standard shisha bowl at a peak surface temperature near 680 °C. Premium and Super Premium burn 2+ hours per cube.

oem.h2: OEM and private-label packaging from your design files.
oem.intro: We print 1 kg inner boxes (full-colour, {{innerBoxGsm}} gsm), inner plastic with your logo, and {{masterBoxSizes}} master boxes (single- or double-wall) — from your {{acceptedArtworkFormats}} artwork, with a packaging proof inside {{proofTimeDays}} working days.

full.name: Full packaging
full.summary: Inner plastic + inner box + master box. Retail-ready out of the container.
full.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal full packaging tier — printed inner plastic pouch, full-colour 1 kg inner box and 20 kg master carton, photographed at the Semarang factory.

standard.name: Standard packaging
standard.summary: Inner plastic + inner box. The most common SKU for retail and lounge accounts.
standard.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal standard packaging tier — printed inner plastic pouch and full-colour 1 kg inner box, photographed at the Semarang factory.

minimal.name: Pouch in master
minimal.summary: Inner plastic + master box. Wholesale bulk for distributors who repack locally.
minimal.imageAlt: Mulia Charcoal minimal packaging tier — printed inner plastic pouches inside a 10 kg master carton, photographed at the Semarang factory.

oem.ctaDesigner: Discuss your brand with our designer

items.a: Yes. Send us print-ready Adobe Illustrator (.ai) or PDF files at the dieline dimensions we share. We accept CMYK at 300 dpi with bleed; if you have InDesign or Photoshop sources we can usually open those too.

items.q: What is the print proof time?
items.a: We turn around a packaging proof within {{proofTimeDays}} working days of receiving final artwork. The proof is a physical printed sample on the actual board stock; you sign it off before the production run.

items.q: Minimum order to start a private label?
items.a: {{moqLabel}} FOB {{port}}. The 18-ton minimum is a single 20-ft FCL — you can mix shapes and grades inside one container, but we do not split containers across buyers.

gallery.h2: Inside our {{city}} factory and container loading.
gallery.introTemplate: These are photographs and short vertical videos of our actual production floor in {{city}} and our 20-ft container loading process — taken {{galleryLastUpdated}}. Click any image to view it full-size.

contact.h2: Talk to us about your container.
contact.introTemplate: We answer enquiries within {{responseHours}} hours, in {{salesLanguages}} — by WhatsApp, email, or this form. Office hours: {{officeHours}} Asia/Jakarta ({{timezone}}).
contact.successBody: We will reply within {{responseHours}} business hours. For faster response, message us on WhatsApp.

fields.name: Full name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your target volume, destination port and timeline.
fields.privacyConsentTemplate: I agree that {{brand}} may contact me about my inquiry and store my details under their privacy policy.

cta.headline: Ready to load your first container? Sample 1 kg ships free.
cta.subTemplate: Production from {{leadTimeDays}} days, Tanjung Emas ({{city}}) loading.
cta.waPrefill: Hello Mulia Charcoal — please send a free 1 kg sample and your latest USD price list FOB Semarang for coconut shisha charcoal briquettes.

items.q: What is your minimum order quantity?
items.a: {{moqLabel}} FOB {{port}}. We do not split containers, but you can mix shapes and grades within a single 20ft container.

items.q: How long is production lead time?
items.a: {{leadTimeLabel}} from receipt of the 30% T/T deposit. We schedule the booking with the shipping line in parallel so the container is ready on the agreed laycan.

items.q: Which shipping lines do you load with?
items.a: Maersk, MSC and CMA CGM out of {{port}}. We file IMDG {{unNumber}} Class {{unClass}} declarations and provide the Self-Heating Test report with every booking.
Yes. We offer master-box, inner-box and individual cube-wrap printing. Your designer works directly with our packaging lead; minimum private-label order is one 20ft container.

items.q: What payment terms do you accept?
items.a: T/T 30/70 (30% deposit, 70% against B/L copy), or L/C at sight. Wire details are released only after KYC. We invoice in USD.
Yes. Samples ship by air courier; sample fee and freight are quoted by destination. Lab-grade samples include a batch COA so you can verify the burn specs before placing the wholesale order.
